scenarios.title: Same tenant
scenarios.caption: The agent acts as a tenant-A principal on a tenant-A account. The read is permitted (policy 03, with PII redaction applied).

formatted.summary: Allowed: User::"agent" Action::"getAccount" on Account::"ACC-1" — policy 03-hubspot-pii-redacted (ASI04 Data Exfiltration — HubSpot account and contact reads are permitted only when agent-shield will apply PII redaction to the response. Mitigates leakage of PII into LLM context or downstream tool calls.).
reasonLines: [PERMIT] 03-hubspot-pii-redacted: ASI04 Data Exfiltration — HubSpot account and contact reads are permitted only when agent-shield will apply PII redaction to the response. Mitigates leakage of PII into LLM context or downstream tool calls.

scenarios.title: Cross tenant
scenarios.caption: The identical request against a tenant-B account is denied. Only the resource tenant changed; policy 07 forbids the crossing.

formatted.summary: Denied: User::"agent" Action::"getAccount" on Account::"ACC-8" — forbidden by policy 07-tenant-isolation (ASI06 Inter-Agent / Cross-Boundary — Cross-tenant access is denied. A principal may only act on resources within its own tenant; principal.tenant must equal resource.tenant.).
reasonLines: [FORBID] 07-tenant-isolation: ASI06 Inter-Agent / Cross-Boundary — Cross-tenant access is denied. A principal may only act on resources within its own tenant; principal.tenant must equal resource.tenant.
